calendar.matters:
Petition For An Accounting And For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Sep-17-2018 Off Calendar

Petition For An Accounting And For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Jul-16-2018 Continued To Sep-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Monica Castro appeared by telephone for Herbert Moore (Petitioner).
Caroline Hinshaw appeared by telephone for Kelli Mallen (Trustee/Respondent).

Ms. Hinshaw stated that the Trustee has provided some interim accountings, that it is her understanding that the Beneficiary was going to be making a proposal, and that she is not opposed to mediation, but she thinks they can get the matter settled on their own. Ms. Castro concurs and requested that the matter be pushed out for 60-days. The Petition for An Accounting, etc. is continued to September 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
